subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! 'Abdu'l-Bahá was for a time afflicted with ill health, and this too was in accordance with His wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان عبدالبهاء مدتی بنقاهت مزاج مبتلا بود و این را نیز نظر بحکمتش
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @study; deepening
